schema_version.description: Schema version using MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH semver. PATCH changes are auto-handled at runtime. MINOR and MAJOR changes are not yet supported; future versions may introduce a migration command.

name.description: Mode name (lowercase, alphanumeric with hyphens and underscores)

nono_profile.description: Path to nono profile JSON file (relative to mode directory). Auto-discovers 'nono-profile.json' if not specified. Set to null to disable nono profiles.

prompt.description: Main prompt content with inline file embedding. Any '@file_name' references are replaced with file contents (if text) or file paths (if binary). Supports recursive embedding with circular reference detection. Defaults to loading PROMPT.md file.

append_prompt.description: Additional prompt content appended via pi's --append-system-prompt CLI flag. Supports same '@file_name' inline embedding as prompt field.

disable_pi_system_prompt.description: Disable pi's default system prompt, using only mode prompt

disable_pi_append_system_prompt.description: Disable pi's default append system prompt, using only mode append prompt

extensions.description: List of extension paths relative to mode directory. Defaults to auto-discovery from extensions/ directory. Set to null to disable mode extensions.

disable_extension_discovery.description: Disable pi's default extension discovery (does not affect mode-specific extension loading)

cli_args.description: Additional CLI arguments to pass to pi command

require_flavor.description: When true, a flavor must be active. Bare invocation without a flavor prints help listing available flavors with descriptions. Top-level prompt is not required when enabled but can still be defined as a shared base prompt for all flavors. FATAL validation error if true but no flavors are defined.

default_flavor.description: Flavor to use when none is specified via dot notation. Must reference a key in the flavors object (not an alias). Validated at load time.

aliases.description: Shorter alternative names for this flavor. All aliases must be unique across all flavor names and aliases in the mode.

override_config.description: Configuration overrides when this flavor is active

nono_profile.description: Override nono profile path. Set to null to return to default behavior.

prompt.description: Override prompt file path. Set to null to return to default PROMPT.md.

append_prompt.description: Override append prompt content. Set to null to return to default.

disable_pi_system_prompt.description: Override pi system prompt setting. Set to null to return to default.

disable_pi_append_system_prompt.description: Override pi append system prompt setting. Set to null to return to default.

extensions.description: Override extension list. Set to null to return to default.

disable_extension_discovery.description: Override extension auto-discovery setting. Set to null to return to default.

cli_args.description: Override CLI arguments. Set to null to return to default.

flavors.description: Named mode variants selected via dot notation (e.g., mode-name.flavor). Only one flavor can be active at a time.
